report.summary: Audited 2 new pages from build-v2 (Crypto Passive Income Guide, Cryptocurrency Beginners Guide), created 2 missing OG images, and fixed 3 UX issues including a broken JSX Link rendered as raw text, table min-widths for mobile, and iOS touch-scroll optimization.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: Fixed broken Link in /learn/cryptocurrency-beginners-guide-2026 Section 10 'Next Steps' — the 'Learn Cold Storage Best Practices' card had a raw HTML string containing <Link> JSX that rendered as literal text instead of a clickable link; replaced with proper JSX Link component
Added min-width (600px) to passive income comparison table (5 columns) in /learn/crypto-passive-income-guide-2026 for proper horizontal scroll on mobile instead of column compression
Added min-width (520px) to crypto comparison table (4 columns) in /learn/cryptocurrency-beginners-guide-2026 for mobile scroll behavior
Added WebkitOverflowScrolling: touch to passive income comparison table for smooth iOS momentum scrolling
Added WebkitOverflowScrolling: touch to beginners crypto comparison table for smooth iOS momentum scrolling

Both pages confirmed structurally sound — proper server components with metadata exports, BackToTop, StructuredData (article + FAQ schemas), breadcrumb navigation with aria-label, Table of Contents with anchor links, disclaimers, and related guides sections

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: crypto-passive-income-guide-2026 (1200x630 SVG) — dark theme with horizontal bar chart showing APY ranges for each method (ETH Staking, Liquid Staking, Restaking, Lending, Yield Farming), stats boxes ($17.5B EigenLayer TVL, 3.3% ETH APY, 4-6% stablecoin yield, $8.27B Pendle TVL), protocol name pills (Lido, Aave, EigenLayer, Pendle, Morpho, Curve), category badges (DeFi, Earning, Beginner)

OG image: cryptocurrency-beginners-guide-2026 (1200x630 SVG) — dark theme with crypto asset cards (BTC $1.4T, ETH $250B, SOL $80B), stats cards (126 ETFs approved, $10 min investment, DCA strategy), topic pills (Blockchain, Wallets, Exchanges, Investing, Security, DCA Guide), learning checklist (6 items), category badges (Crypto Basics, Getting Started, Beginner)

sections.title: Pages Audited
items: /learn/crypto-passive-income-guide-2026 — 2 fixes applied (table min-width 600px, iOS touch scrolling). Server component with metadata, BackToTop, structured data all confirmed present

/learn/cryptocurrency-beginners-guide-2026 — 3 fixes applied (broken Link JSX in Next Steps section, table min-width 520px, iOS touch scrolling). Server component with metadata, BackToTop, structured data all confirmed present

sections.title: Recommendations for Future Sprints
items: Add scroll-margin-top to section anchors across learn articles for sticky header offset when navigating via Table of Contents
Add hover underline styles for internal links across learn articles — currently no hover feedback on text links
Consider adding a Breadcrumb component import (reusable) instead of inline breadcrumb nav markup for consistency across learn pages
